criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence to enhance learning experiences.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, developer websites, user reviews.

criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: The level of user interaction and engagement facilitated by the app.
criteria.sources: User reviews, app analytics, engagement metrics.

criteria.name: Educational Content Quality
criteria.description: The accuracy, relevance, and comprehensiveness of the educational material provided.

criteria.name: Personalization
criteria.description: The app's ability to tailor learning experiences to individual user needs.
criteria.sources: App features, user feedback, developer information.

criteria.name: User Interface and Experience
criteria.description: The design, usability, and overall user experience of the app.
criteria.sources: User reviews, usability studies, app design evaluations.
